summary: Tested BunkerHostal Phase 3 additions (Fidelización, Marketplace, public Directorio, PWA manifest, dynamic SEO on /web, sidebar/BottomNav enablement) plus the 2 post-Phase-2 Dashboard enhancements (Modo Directo indicator, Compartir enlace card). All features pass. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and well organized (Fidelizacion.jsx, Marketplace.jsx, Directorio.jsx, AppContext additions). No DRY violations, no sync IO blocking, no hardcoded URLs. All new interactive elements have data-testid.

Minor observation (not a bug): the mobile BottomNav 'Operaciones' button click via Playwright's native click(force=True) sometimes did not register the onClick immediately, requiring a JS-dispatched click to open the drawer; manual/JS clicks worked fine and drawer functioned correctly, so this appears to be a Playwright timing quirk rather than an app bug.
test_credentials: Albergue El Camino + any 4-digit PIN (e.g. 1234) + Rol Director. No real auth backend.
seed_data_creation: Added one test marketplace service ('TEST Nueva Panadería') via UI to verify add/persistence flow; left in localStorage state (harmless mock data, not seeded via backend).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully verified: Fidelizacion page (5 ranking rows, disabled activate button w/ tooltip), Marketplace (add/edit/validation/toast/persistence via localStorage 'bunkerhostal_state' all confirmed), Directorio public route (loads without login, search/comunidad/capacidad filters incl. Galicia empty-state, dynamic document.title + meta description confirmed), /web SEO title changes correctly per hostel slug (verified albergue-el-camino vs albergue-los-pinos), manifest.json returns correct valid JSON, Sidebar shows all items enabled (Fidelización/Marketplace no longer 'Próximamente'), mobile BottomNav Operaciones drawer shows all 6 enabled items and navigates+closes correctly. Dashboard 'Modo Directo activo' indicator (toggling ON in Reservas>Channel Manager) and 'Compartir enlace' card (copy + WhatsApp button) both confirmed working. No regressions found in Reservas/Channel Manager toggle flow.
